column5: 4. Have you ever needed medical calculators or clinical scoring tools in your practice or training?

column7: 6. How useful do you think CalcForDocs would be in your clinical work or training?

column9: 8. How easy do you think CalcForDocs would be to use?

column12: 11. If yes, which tool(s) do you use?
column13: 12. Compared with similar tools, how likely would you be to try CalcForDocs?
column14: 13. Would you trust a healthcare platform developed by Nigerian healthcare professionals if it provides accurate and evidence-based calculations?
column15: 14. How likely are you to recommend CalcForDocs to colleagues if it meets your needs?
column16: 15. What additional features would you like to see in CalcForDocs?
Children healthcare centiles calculators for BP, malnutrition, et cetera
Giving differentials diagnosis if asked a clinical case
Make navigation a bit easier and a more modern UI
Colors for different stage and levels
Normal ranges of some laboratory parameters
